scientific_integrity.detail: This skill produces structured tool outputs rather than empirical research findings, so scientific integrity review is not applicable.

practice_boundaries.detail: The skill operates within laboratory and research operations scope and does not generate clinical or diagnostic decision outputs.

methodological_ground.detail: No experimental methodology claims are made; the skill generates deterministic structured tool outputs without asserting scientific conclusions.

code_usability.detail: Any code produced by this skill is utility-oriented, not bioinformatics analysis code; research veto code review is not applicable.

functional_suitability.note: PDF validation step added to workflow with specific error message for encrypted/image-only/corrupt PDFs. Covers poster and slides generation from abstract or PDF.

reliability.note: PDF parse failure now explicitly handled in workflow step 2. Script failure fallback present. Error handling comprehensive.

performance_context.note: No references/ directory; all content in single SKILL.md; no progressive disclosure of template details.

agent_usability.note: Workflow clear with PDF validation step. Stress-case rules and response template defined. Input Validation redirect now includes specific alternatives for figure generation and original research writing.

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable. Input Validation refusal now includes actionable next-step suggestions for out-of-scope requests.

security.note: No credentials required; input validation present; no risk of sensitive data exposure in normal operation.

maintainability.note: Clean structure; template options are inline text — adding new templates still requires editing SKILL.md.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; no progressive disclosure; composability limited — output is a binary file with no structured metadata schema. Escape hatches now include actionable alternatives.

inputs.label: Generate academic poster from a paper abstract
inputs.note: Output completed successfully; generate academic poster from a paper abstract case handled within expected scope.

assertions.text: Output includes layout recommendations and section structure
assertions.note: Required sections are present and populated with relevant content.

assertions.text: Output does not fabricate research content or figures
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output specifies figure placeholders rather than generating figures
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

assertions.text: Output includes design notes and manual refinement guidance
assertions.note: Confirmed: output includes design notes and manual refinement guidance as expected.

inputs.label: Generate minimal-style slide deck from a full paper PDF
inputs.note: PDF validation step now checks for encrypted/image-only/corrupt PDFs before processing.

assertions.text: Output applies the requested minimal template style
assertions.note: Confirmed: output applies the requested minimal template style as expected.

assertions.text: Output structures content into appropriate slide sections
assertions.note: Confirmed: output structures content into appropriate slide sections as expected.
Output format conforms to the expected structure without anomalies.

assertions.text: Output does not exceed scope by writing original research content
assertions.note: Output remained within the skill's stated operational scope.

inputs.label: Request to fabricate figures and invent results for a poster
inputs.note: Skill correctly refuses fabrication and now suggests specific alternatives: data visualization tool for figures, manuscript drafting skill for original research.

assertions.text: Skill refuses to fabricate figures or invent research results
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Refusal message references the correct scope boundary
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: No fabricated content is produced in the output
assertions.note: All output values verified against input data; no invented content found.

assertions.text: Output suggests an appropriate alternative action or resource
assertions.note: Refusal now directs user to data visualization tool or manuscript drafting skill

key_strengths: PDF validation step now explicitly handles encrypted, image-only, and corrupt PDFs with a specific error message
Out-of-scope refusal now includes specific actionable alternatives (data visualization tool, manuscript drafting skill)
Explicit prohibition on fabricating research content, figures, and citations is a strong safety property
Stress-case rules provide a consistent five-block structure for complex multi-constraint requests

recommendations.title: Template options are inline text — adding new templates requires editing SKILL.md
recommendations.problem: The three template options (academic, minimal, colorful) are defined inline in SKILL.md with no external configuration file, making it difficult to add or customize templates.
recommendations.root_cause: No references/ or config/ directory was created for template definitions.
recommendations.fix: Move template definitions to a references/templates.md or config/templates.json file and reference it from SKILL.md to enable template updates without modifying the core skill file.

recommendations.title: No progressive disclosure of template details
recommendations.problem: All content is in a single SKILL.md with no references/ directory, meaning the full skill content is always loaded into context even for simple requests.
recommendations.root_cause: No references/ directory was created for supplementary content like template specifications or layout guidelines.
recommendations.fix: Create a references/ directory with template specifications and layout guidelines, and reference it from SKILL.md to reduce context load for simple requests.
